Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand the data Timestamp action type and attributes App Window and sometimes additional details

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Key actions FOCUS User switched to focused on an application document TYPING User typed something SAVE User saved a document SWITCH User switched between applications CLICK User performed a click action SCROLL User scrolled HIGHLIGHT User highlighted text CLOSE User closed a document application

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Cases 1 Document1 Session1 Initial draft work 085950 to 090145 2 AnnualMeeting Email Email handling 090145 to 090400 3 ReportDraft PDFReview PDF review 090400 to 090500 4 Budget2024 Update Excel work 090515 to 090630 5 Document1 Session2 Reference insertion work 090600 to 090700 6 QuarterlyReport ExecutiveSummary Final executive summary 090715 to 090815

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity names should be standardized FOCUS Start Work Session or just include as a meaningful transition TYPING Write Content or Compose Text SAVE Save Document SWITCH Switch Application CLICK Perform Click or specific action SCROLL Navigate Document HIGHLIGHT Annotate Document CLOSE Close Document
